sections.paragraph:
Original: פּסנתּרין פּסנטרין

Transliteration: pesanṭêrı̂yn pesantêrı̂yn

Phonetic: pis-an-tay-reen'

BDB Definition:

  1. a stringed instrument (triangular)
    1. perhaps a lyre or a harp

Origin: a transliteration of the Gr psalterion

TWOT entry: 2943

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
